titleStmt.title: SII 5.417: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 417. (A.R. No. 128 of 1894). IN THE SAME PLACE.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūviṉkiḻatti mevi viṟṟiruppa metiṉimātu nitiyiṟ puṇara vayappormaṭantai jayappuyat tiruppa mākka
laimaṭantai vākkiṉil viḷaṅka ticai Irunāṉkum mikainilā veṟippa maṟaineṟi vaḷara maṉuneṟi tikaḻa Aṟaneṟic ca
mayaṅka ḷāṟun taḻaippa kāṉaveṅkayai villuṭaṉ turantu miṉaṅ kaṉakācalattu viṟṟiruppa Eṇkiri
cūḻnta Eḻkaṭa leḻpoḻil veṇkuṭai niḻaṟṟac ceṅkol naṭappak koṭuṅkali naṭuṅki neṭumpilat toḻi
ppa villavar cempiyar virāṭa varāṭavar pallavar tiṟaiyuṭaṉ muṟaimuṟai paṇiya virunemiyaḷavum Orunemi yoṅ
ka Iṉṉamutākiya viyalicaināṭaka maṉṉi vaḷara maṇimuṭi cūṭi viḷaṅkiya virasi mhāsaṉattu viṟṟiruntaruḷiya śrīko
ccaṭaiyapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉacakkaravattikaḷ śrīkulacekarade vaṟkku yāṇṭu muṉṟāvatu nāḷ Iraṇṭāyirat toru
nūṟṟaimpattiraṇṭiṉāl maturotaiyavaḷanāṭṭu māṭakkuḷakkiḻ maturaikkoyiṟ paḷḷiyaṟaikkūṭattup paḷḷippiṭa
ṅ kāliṅkarāyaṉil Eḻuntaruḷi Iruntu kiḻvempanāṭṭut tirunelvelic cuttavallip perunteruviṟ caṅka
raṉpāṭiyār ceyyattiruvāymoḻintaruḷiṉapaṭi Uṭaiyaār tirunelveli Uṭaiyār koyiṟ tiruvarttamaṇṭapattuk
kut tirunelveli Apimāṉa pūṣaṇaṉterinta kaikkoḷaril coṟaṉ periyāṉāṉa jayasi mhade varuṅ kaṇavati Aḻakaṉāna
kaḷappāḷaṉum Oṉpatāvatu mutal Iṭṭa tiruviḷakkukku nāḷoṉṟukku Eṇṇai muṉṉāḻiyākat tirunelvelic cut
tavallipperunteruviṟ caṅkaraṉpāṭiyār Eṇṇai Aḷappārāka Ivarkaḷukku nilanivantāmāka Ittevar tevatā
ṉattil ceyaciṅkatevarkkuṅ kaḷappāḷaṉukkum kāṇiyāyk kaṭamai Iṟuttu Aṉupavittu varukiṟa mel
vempanāṭṭut tevarkuḷattu nilattile Iraṇṭu veli nilam nilanivantamāka nikkik kuṭukkap peṟaveṇu
meṉṟum Ivarkaḷ namakkuc coṉṉamaiyil Ittevar tirumaṇṭapattukkuc cayaciṅkatevarum kaḷappāḷaṉum Iṭ
ṭa tiruviḷakkukku nāḷoṉṟukku muṉṉāḻiyāka vanta Eṇṇai cuttavallipperunteruviṟ caṅkaraṉpāṭiyār Aḷappatāka
Ivarkaḷukku nivantamāka Ittevar tevatāṉam melvempanāṭṭut tevarkuḷattile Iraṇṭuveli nilam Oṉpatā
vatu mutal nikkuvittuk koḷkaveṉṟum Iṉnilattāl vanta kaṭamai Antarāyam Āṇṭu Oṉṟukku Accup patiṉeṭ
ṭāka Ikkoyiṟ tevarcelavu nikki mikutiyile Ikkuḷattukku Iṟuttuvaruṅ Accile Oṉpatāvatu mutal tavirka
veṉṟum Ippaṭic cantirātittavaṟ celvatākak kalliluñ cempilum veṭṭikkoḷkaveṉṟu tiruvāymo
ḻintaruḷiṉār. Ivai tiruvaḻutivaḷanāṭṭu Irājairājanallūr Araiyaṉ terpoliyaniṉṟāṉāṉa vaḻutinārāya
ṇa muventaveḷāṉ Eḻuttu Ivai pallavarājan Eḻuttu
Digital edition of SII 5.417 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
